integrated_outputs.summary: Slimmed App orchestration to shell routing, app-level pages, selected task/run state, and topbar/sidebar wiring.
Moved Task Thread content into a Codex-like thread body with run-bound navigation rail, Task intent turn, Run timeline, Evidence preview, and #93/#94/#95 semantics.
Extracted sticky composer behavior with type-to-composer focus and width-aware icon preservation.
Extracted right inspector tabs for Evidence, Harbor session, Identity, Site Skill, Diagnostics, and Source health fixture.
Centralized Task Thread source field and context panel primitives.
Packaged Electron baseline screenshot captured before #170 migration.
Packaged Electron screenshot captured after migrating #93/#94/#95 content into the shell.

validation.summary: TypeScript renderer/main checks and Vite production renderer build passed.
Packaged Electron preview launched non-blank; smoke screenshot written to artifacts/gh-170-task-thread-migration.png.

codegraph_references.summary: Explored restored `threads/thread-layout.tsx`, `threads/thread-scroll-layout/index.tsx`, `conversations/local-conversation-thread-parts/local-conversation-thread-frame.tsx`, and `conversations/local-conversation-thread-parts/local-conversation-thread-body-layout.tsx`. Absorb sticky header/body shell, independent scroll container, content max-width, sticky footer/fade, and content-unit navigation strategy. Do not absorb Codex composer product semantics, signal/store runtime, MCP/live PIP frame, background-agent context, or private runtime contracts.
Explored current `ThreadWorkspace`, `BottomPanelSlot`, `ThreadNavigationRail`, Task Thread fixtures, right inspector tabs, and shell primitives before editing.

out_of_scope: Codex private runtime or business semantics

notes: Subagent not used: GH-170 writes one shared renderer thread composition and one shared Loom carrier; parallel writers would increase conflict risk.
Current fixture functions and data structures do not define real implementation contracts.
